tools.name: outlook_attachments
tools.description: List or download Outlook email attachments. Use action 'list' to enumerate attachments on a message, then 'download' to save a specific attachment to disk.

action.description: List attachments on a message, or download a specific attachment

attachment_id.description: Attachment ID (required for download, from a prior list call)

activity.description: Brief non-technical explanation of why this tool is being called

account.description: Email address of the Outlook account to use. Required when multiple Outlook accounts are connected. If omitted, uses the most recently connected account.
